steps.title: Use the horizontal line
steps.content: The second equation gives $y=19$. Substitute $19$ into $y=4x-9$: $$19=4x-9.$$

steps.title: Solve for $x$
steps.content: Add $9$ to both sides: $28=4x$. Divide by $4$: $x=7$. So the solution is $(7,19)$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is correct. Choice A uses the wrong $x$-value, and choices C and D reverse the order of the coordinates.
